# Proceedings of 2004 International Conference on Machine Learning and Cybernetics : August 6-29, 2004, Worldfield Convention Hotel, Shanghai, China

Contributors: ieee systems, man and cybernetics technical committee on cybernetics, international conference on machine learning and cybernetics
Date: 2004
Subjects: congresses, machine learning, cybernetics

"IEEE Catalog Number: 04EX826." Includes bibliographical references and author index. Also issued online with additional title: Machine Learning and Cybernetics, 2004, Proceedings of 2004 International Conference on.
